description: Letter from Nahray b. Nissim, from Alexandria, to Yosef b. Eli Kohen Fasi, Fustat. Around 1055. Regarding trading in iron and coins, especially Byzantine dinar-quarters. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #260) VMR A. L. Udovitch's transcription differs from the earlier transcription of Bernard Dov Shapira, so the PGP team of the 1990s has produced an edition using Udovitch's transcription as a base-text, indicating the differences between the two transcriptions with an asterisk and giving Shapira's reading at the end of the line in parentheses. MR
